code: import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import"./ZeusStatsBar.scss";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ZeusStatsBar=()=>{const[stats,setStats]=useState({health:0,maxHealth:250});useEffect(()=>{let hasPlayed=false;const handleUpdate=event=>{const{health,maxHealth}=event.detail;setStats({health,maxHealth});if(!hasPlayed){hasPlayed=true;const audio=new Audio("/sounds/thunder.mp3");audio.volume=0.7;audio.play().catch(err=>console.warn("Thunder sound error:",err));}};window.addEventListener("zeus_stats_update",handleUpdate);return()=>{window.removeEventListener("zeus_stats_update",handleUpdate);};},[]);const percent=Math.round(stats.health/stats.maxHealth*100);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"zeus-health-bar-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"zeus-health-bar-fill",style:{width:`${percent}%`}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"zeus-health-bar-text",children:["ZEUS HEALTH: ",stats.health," / ",stats.maxHealth]})]});};export default ZeusStatsBar;
